summary: Iteration 20 - Testing COMPLETE removal of ALL prices from SeknuTo.cz. Found and FIXED 1 issue: Spring package on ServicesPage still showed 'od 8 Kč/m²'. After fix, all pages pass - NO price numbers anywhere.

fixed_issues.issue: Spring package (Jarní balíček) still showed 'od 8 Kč/m²' instead of 'Po obhlídce'
fixed_issues.fix: Changed price: 'od 8' to 'Po obhlídce' and unit: 'Kč/m²' to ''

passed_tests: HomePage: No price numbers (Kč, m², /hod) found
ServicesPage: No price numbers found (after fix)
Service cards show 'Cena po obhlídce' / 'Individuální kalkulace'
All 4 seasonal packages show 'Po obhlídce' or 'Individuální'
Has 4 steps process (Pošlete poptávku, Bezplatná obhlídka, Cena předem, Práce hotova)
All basic services show 'Po obhlídce' / 'Po domluvě'
Step 2 shows 'Cena bude stanovena po obhlídce' for all services
Additional services have NO prices in parentheses
critical_code_review_comments: All prices successfully removed from the site
Navigation updated to 'Jak to funguje' in both Header and Footer
PricingPage completely transformed to 4-step process page
All services now show 'Po obhlídce' / 'Po domluvě' / 'Individuální kalkulace'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete price removal verified. One issue found and fixed: ServicesPage spring_package had 'od 8 Kč/m²' - changed to 'Po obhlídce'. All pages now show 'Po obhlídce', 'Po domluvě', or 'Individuální kalkulace' instead of any price numbers. Navigation shows 'Jak to funguje' instead of 'Ceník'. PricingPage is now a 4-step process page with no calculator.

global.no_price_numbers: Verified NO Kč, m², /hod patterns on any page
global.navigation: 'Jak to funguje' in Header and Footer (not 'Ceník')

pricing_page.page_type: Transformed to 'Jak to funguje' - 4 steps process

booking_page.step_2: 'Cena bude stanovena po obhlídce' for all services
